_preview:
| Sign        | Mood     | Lucky# | Colour | Coffee | Bug Energy | Deploy?      |
|-------------|----------|--------|--------|--------|------------|--------------|
| Aries       | Sleepy   | 3      | Red    | 2/5    | Low        | No           |
| Taurus      | Anxious  | 4      | Green  | 3/5    | Low        | Yes          |
| Gemini      | Happy    | 5      | Yellow | 3/5    | Medium     | Maybe        |
| Cancer      | Sleepy   | 8      | Silver | 2/5    | Low        | Maybe        |
| Leo         | Proud    | 7      | Gold   | 2/5    | Low        | No           |
| Virgo       | Happy    | 6      | Green  | 4/5    | Low        | Yes          |
| Libra       | Romantic | 9      | Pink   | 2/5    | Low        | No           |
| Scorpio     | Sleepy   | 4      | Purple | 3/5    | Medium     | Maybe        |
| Sagittarius | Proud    | 3      | Orange | 4/5    | High       | No           |
| Capricorn   | Proud    | 9      | Brown  | 4/5    | Low        | Yes          |
| Aquarius    | Romantic | 4      | Blue   | 3/5    | Medium     | Maybe        |
| Pisces      | Anxious  | 8      | Teal   | 3/5    | Medium     | Maybe        |

aries.horoscope_text: The general atmosphere of the day may seem too slow and stodgy for your tastes, Aries. Try not to get bogged down in details. Try not to worry too much. You may find that it's difficult to get any enthusiasm out of people today. You might just want to sit back and take it easy. This is a good day to plan and reorganize. Honor your recent achievements and consolidate all that you've worked for.
aries.deploy_today: No — the stars say plan and reorganize. That means no deployments.
aries.prophecy: The stars say sit back and take it easy. Your standup is in 10 minutes. 😴

taurus.horoscope_text: This is a terrific day for you, Taurus. You'll notice a sense of well-being that makes you feel secure that all your hard work is finally starting to pay off. You've reached a comfortable resting point where you can relax and regroup before continuing forward.
taurus.deploy_today: Yes — your hard work is paying off. The stars approve. Push it.
taurus.prophecy: Your hard work is finally paying off. Someone else will present it in the all-hands. 😰

gemini.horoscope_text: Try not to be too fixed in your attitude today, Gemini. Realize that you may have to give a little in order to work comfortably with the people around you. It's important that you be slow and reserved in your moves, especially in matters of the heart. Be open and receptive. Try not to scare anyone away with abrasive words or insisting that you're always right.
gemini.deploy_today: Maybe — be open and receptive today. Especially to the reviewer who flagged that edge case.
gemini.prophecy: The stars say stop insisting you're always right. The stars have clearly not seen your git history. 😁

cancer.horoscope_text: There's a loving tenderness in the air that you'll find very comforting, Cancer. Ground your sensitive emotions and make room for love to enter the picture. It could be that you're feeling indecisive when it comes to matters of love and romance. The best thing for you to do is stabilize your emotions and then make the effort to connect intimately with another. The decisions will flow naturally from there.
cancer.deploy_today: Maybe — make a decision today. Any decision. The ticket has been In Progress for 3 weeks.
cancer.prophecy: The stars say stabilize before deciding. Your PR has been 'almost ready' since Tuesday. 😴

leo.horoscope_text: You may need to slow down a bit after the hectic pace of the last couple of days, Leo. It's essential that you take a more reserved and sensitive approach, especially with matters having to do with the heart. Center yourself and focus on receiving affection rather than pursuing conquest.
leo.deploy_today: No — the stars say slow down after the hectic pace. Your last 3 deploys agree.
leo.prophecy: The stars say slow down and receive affection. Your on-call rotation does not care. 😏

virgo.horoscope_text: You should notice a boost of energy today, Virgo, and your self-confidence should be revitalized. In matters of love and romance, everything is running smoothly. Your emotions are stable and grounded. Love and harmony are in the air. Take this opportunity to move toward the object of your desire with certainty and affection. Romance is in the cards for you tonight.
virgo.deploy_today: Yes — energy up, emotions stable. This is your deploy window.
virgo.prophecy: Love and harmony are in the air. Your CI pipeline has not gotten the memo yet. 😁

libra.horoscope_text: Take it easy today, Libra, and work to digest some of the input you've received over the past couple days. This is a day to contemplate and plan. With matters of the heart, you may find that a sensitive, grounded approach works best. This isn't always your favorite mode of operation, but it's one that will provide you with the balance to counteract your usual frenzied pace.
libra.deploy_today: No — today is for contemplating and planning. Not shipping.
libra.prophecy: The stars say digest all the input you've received. You have 47 unread Slack messages. Start there. 😍

scorpio.horoscope_text: Anything having to do with love and romance is likely to go well today if you play your cards right, Scorpio. Ground your fluctuating emotions through a practical approach. Communicate with groups and embrace your sensitive nature — doing so will earn you great appreciation.
scorpio.deploy_today: Maybe — things go well if you play your cards right. Read that diff one more time.
scorpio.prophecy: Things will go well if you play your cards right. You will play the wrong card in the 3pm meeting. 😴

sagittarius.horoscope_text: Don't be surprised if you run into a few emotional roadblocks today, Sagittarius. People could be quite stubborn and difficult to deal with. You may exacerbate the situation by trying to get a rise out of someone with your boisterous attitude and dramatic flair. If your efforts don't yield positive results, back off. Keep your energy to yourself and share it another time when people are more in the mood to play.
sagittarius.deploy_today: No — people are stubborn today. Including the reviewer who has been silent for 6 days.
sagittarius.prophecy: The stars say keep your energy to yourself today. Your Slack messages say otherwise. 😏

capricorn.horoscope_text: The planets align to make this a great day for you, Capricorn. You should find that your mood is excellent and your mind focused. Romance will thrive in the nice, stabilizing atmosphere, and you should feel free to take center stage. If you've been suffering from any doubts lately, now is the time to take control of the situation and go for it.
capricorn.deploy_today: Yes — planets align, mood excellent, mind focused. This is the one.
capricorn.prophecy: The planets align for a great day. Your internet will go down at 2pm. 😏

aquarius.horoscope_text: Try to bring things down to reality today, Aquarius. This is a good day to consolidate and organize. When it comes to matters of love and romance, try not to be so fickle. Ground yourself rather than maintaining ambiguity.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — bring things down to reality. Including that feature scoped for 'a few hours'.
aquarius.prophecy: The stars say consolidate and organize. You have 23 open tabs and 4 unfinished branches. Start there. 😍

pisces.horoscope_text: Your sensitivity will be greatly appreciated today, Pisces, and you'll find that there is a great grounding force that will help balance your extreme emotions. Try not to be too stubborn, especially with things having to do with love and beauty. A fixed attitude will most likely run into a great deal of opposition. If a certain someone gets uptight, you'll have a difficult time getting your point across.
pisces.deploy_today: Maybe — don't be stubborn. If the tests are failing, they're probably right.
pisces.prophecy: A fixed attitude will run into great opposition. So will your PR if you skip the tests. 😰
